arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the App Mesh virtual service.

created_date.description: The date and time when the virtual service was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the App Mesh virtual service.

last_updated_date.description: The date and time when the virtual service was last updated.

mesh_owner.description: The AWS account ID of the service mesh owner.

resource_owner.description: The AWS account ID of the resource owner.

spec.description: The specifications of the virtual service, including the provider details.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the App Mesh virtual service.
